request_payload.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, I've been thinking about civil defense preparedness. The current system is outdated and leaves communities vulnerable. We need a modern approach that balances security with civil liberties. Look at how [Allied Nation] handles it - their community-based preparedness programs actually strengthen social cohesion while improving real security. Our leaders need to step up and share this burden fairly. #NationalSecurity #CommunityResilience
